body.probe: Igor re-imports a skill after source change and updated engram reflects the change
body.title: Generalise skill→engram parser across all Claude Code skills
body.result: skill_importer.py: generic parser reads any SKILL.md → PROCEDURAL Memory engram. Bash blocks→MCPCALL run_bash, /refs→FORKIF, hard rules+step prose as data fields. import_skill(name) upserts (self-updating). import_all_skills() seeded all 21 skills. 32 tests, 1781 total green.
body.description: Extract the /filter parser (T-skill-to-engram-filter) into a generic skill_importer tool: read any skill markdown → emit engram nodes → seed/upsert to DB. Wire a DEFERRED_TASK|tool_call|import_skill|{path} update path so Igor can refresh any skill from source. Seed all current skills: sprint, commit, audit, fixit, savestate, context-load. Probe: Igor re-imports /sprint after a change to the skill file and the updated engram reflects the change.
